g.text: Single data lake for the organization

text.font-family: Segoe Sans Text Semilight,Segoe Sans Text Semilight_MSFontService,sans-serif

g.text: Unified data platform architecture for AI agents and analytics
Foundry agents consume data products via Azure AI Search
(indexes, Knowledge Layers), Fabric data agents, MCP Servers.
: sensitivity labels, data lineage, compliance, data retention, data loss prevention,
data classification, data in AI apps, create Purview data products
Governance and security for the entire enterprise
Data domains determine what data lands in Fabric
Data domains scan their data sources into the
Data Map, which populates the Unified Catalog.
